description: Tracks knowledge base sources for freshness checking. Run npm run knowledge:check-freshness to verify.

sources.name: Emergency Response Guidebook (ERG) 2024
sources.notes: ERG is updated every 4 years. Current edition is 2024.

sources.name: 49 CFR Parts 100-185 (Hazardous Materials Regulations)
sources.notes: CFR is updated annually with interim amendments. Check eCFR for latest.

sources.name: FMCSA Safety Regulations
sources.notes: FMCSA publishes rulemaking updates and safety advisories periodically.

sources.name: PHMSA Training Requirements (OTIS)
sources.notes: 49 CFR 172.704 training requirements. Check for new OTIS guidance annually.

sources.name: FMCSA Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse
sources.notes: Employer-facing Clearinghouse compliance guidance covering 49 CFR Part 382 Subpart G: pre-employment and annual query requirements, prohibited status obligations, reporting timelines, RTD process, record retention, and penalty thresholds. Replaced SDLA REST API Swagger dump on 2026-04-14.

sources.name: Fleet Audit & Procedures Manuals
sources.notes: Internal audit manual, procedures manual, IFTA reference. No external source.
